generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital it is to have robust local preparedness. The recent drills in our district showed that when communities are properly equipped, they can handle emergencies without overburdening national resources. It's not about fear—it's about smart, practical readiness. #CommunityResilience #CivilDefenseMatters
